name: qween-xvfb
onCreateCommand: apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y xvfb chromium chromium-driver ffmpeg x11-utils xdotool fonts-liberation fonts-dejavu-core libglib2.0-0 libnss3 libnspr4 libdbus-1-3 libatk1.0-0 libatk-bridge2.0-0 libcups2 libdrm2 libxkbcommon0 libxcomposite1 libxdamage1 libxfixes3 libxrandr2 libgbm1 libasound2 libpango-1.0-0 libpangocairo-1.0-0 libcairo2 && npm install -g pnpm@9.1.0 && pnpm install && cd apps/api && pip install -r requirements.txt
